insight:
**Race Day Eve Briefing - May 17, 2026**

Yesterday's shakeout run looked perfect! Your 3.6km at an easy pace with 142 bpm average heart rate was exactly what you needed before race day. With 13,113 steps and burning 2,821 calories, your body is primed. That fantastic 9.7 hours of sleep and low stress level of 30/100 shows you're managing pre-race nerves beautifully.

Your HRV at 112ms sits right in your optimal baseline range (94-116ms), and that resting heart rate of 46 bpm confirms excellent cardiovascular readiness. Your recovery markers are green across the board - stick to your planned race strategy without any modifications. Your body is telling you it's ready to perform.

Today, focus on familiar foods and hit that 175g protein target to support muscle readiness. With your excellent sleep bank, avoid any extra caffeine beyond your normal routine. Stay calm, trust your training, and get ready to crush Chester tomorrow!
